name: xAI / Grok
description: xAI Grok API — inference, tools, voice, files, models
notes: Accept: text/markdown causes 404. Go HTTP/2 ALPN causes 404. Use HTTP/1.1 and Accept: */*. llms.txt has 96 sections with ===/<path>=== delimiters.

name: Anthropic
description: Claude API — messages, tools, prompt caching, streaming, agent SDK
notes: Migrated to platform.claude.com (March 2026). llms.txt (62KB, 606 links) and llms-full.txt (24MB, 488 sections) at domain root — NOT under /docs/. URL-based delimiters: sections separated by '# Title' + 'URL: <url>' lines (not xAI-style ===/path===). Individual .md pages work at /docs/en/<path>.md with 307 redirects for renamed pages. Next.js SPA but static .txt endpoints served correctly.

name: OpenAI
description: GPT API — chat completions, responses, assistants, files
notes: No native .md or llms.txt. HTML pages convert cleanly via Jina Reader (227KB for chat reference). OpenAPI spec on GitHub branch manual_spec (not master/main).

name: Pydantic
description: Python data validation using type hints
notes: MkDocs-based. llms-full.txt is a single 1.7MB Markdown dump with no ===/path=== delimiters — treated as single-file archive. Individual .md pages available at /concepts/*/index.md and /api/*/index.md. llms.txt (7KB) is an index with links.

name: AWS CLI
description: AWS Command Line Interface reference and user guide
notes: No per-service llms.txt. Top-level AWS llms.txt (290KB) is an index linking to per-service llms.txt files. CLI docs specifically do not have llms.txt. Would need Jina or hierarchical llms.txt strategy.

name: AWS Glue Developer Guide
description: AWS Glue ETL service — crawlers, jobs, catalogs, connections
notes: Per-service llms.txt available via AWS hierarchical index. User Guide at /glue/latest/dg/llms.txt (228KB). Web API Reference also available at /glue/latest/webapi/llms.txt. Opt-in by service — see docs/providers/README.md.

name: AWS Bedrock User Guide
description: Amazon Bedrock — foundation models, agents, knowledge bases
notes: Per-service llms.txt via AWS hierarchical index. User Guide (181KB). Multi-guide service: userguide and APIReference are separate provider entries to avoid archive path collisions.

name: AWS Bedrock API Reference
description: Amazon Bedrock API — model invocation, agents, knowledge bases API
notes: Per-service llms.txt via AWS hierarchical index. API Reference (228KB). Separate provider entry from userguide to avoid archive path collisions.

name: Trino
description: Distributed SQL query engine — connectors, functions, security
notes: Sphinx-based. No llms.txt. 641 Markdown files currently live under docs/src/main/sphinx/ in GitHub; the repo default branch is master. Raw .md available on GitHub. robots.txt allows /docs/current/. GitHub tree discovery should use authenticated API access via GITHUB_TOKEN in normal operation; anonymous access is best-effort only.

name: Kubernetes kubectl
description: kubectl command reference and cheat sheet
notes: Hugo-based with _index.md convention. 121 Markdown files currently live under content/en/docs/reference/kubectl/ in GitHub; the repo default branch is main. robots.txt does not disallow the kubectl reference path specifically, though Kubernetes API reference paths are disallowed separately. GitHub tree discovery should use authenticated API access via GITHUB_TOKEN in normal operation; anonymous access is best-effort only.

name: Mattermost REST API v4
description: Mattermost API — users, channels, posts, teams, webhooks, bots, OAuth
notes: OpenAPI v4 source YAML split across 56 files (~910KB total). Same github-raw pattern as Trino/kubectl. No llms.txt available. GITHUB_TOKEN recommended.

name: Mattermost Integration Guides
description: Mattermost integrations — webhooks, slash commands, bots, PATs, OAuth, plugins
notes: 54 Markdown files (~350KB) from developer docs source repo. Covers webhooks, slash commands, bots, personal access tokens, OAuth, plugins. GITHUB_TOKEN recommended.
